# Suprfly — AI Auto-Comments for LinkedIn & X

## What is Suprfly?
Suprfly is an AI-powered SaaS platform that automatically generates and posts comments on LinkedIn and X (Twitter) posts. It matches your voice, tone, and personality so comments sound authentically like you.

## How it works
1. Install the Suprfly Chrome Extension
2. Connect your LinkedIn and/or X accounts
3. Set keyword targets (e.g., "SaaS", "AI", "B2B") and/or creator targets (specific profiles to follow)
4. Configure your tone, formality, personality, and style preferences
5. Suprfly discovers matching posts every 10 minutes and generates AI comments
6. Comments are posted automatically (or queued for manual approval)

## Key Features
- AI Voice Engine: Configure tone (Professional/Friendly/Casual/Passionate), formality, personality, comment length, question frequency
- Keyword Targeting: Up to 25 keywords per account, auto-discovers matching posts
- Creator Targeting: Follow up to 100 creators, comment within minutes of their posts
- Content Safety: Two-layer filter (keyword + AI classification) auto-skips political, discriminatory, tragic, explicit content
- Multi-Language: 25+ languages, auto-detects post language and responds natively
- Speed: Comments within 15 minutes of post publication
- Timezone-Aware: Only comments during business hours in the target's timezone
- Manual Approval Mode: Review every comment before it's posted
- Analytics Dashboard: Track followers, connections, comments over time with CSV export

## Pricing
- Starter: $0/mo (7-day trial, 25 comments/day, 1 account)
- Growth: $49/mo (150 comments/day, 2 accounts, LinkedIn + X)
- Agency: $149/mo (500 comments/day, 5 accounts, API access)

## Platforms Supported
- LinkedIn
- X (Twitter)

## Chrome Extension
- Captures session cookies securely (AES-256-GCM encrypted)
- Auto-refreshes sessions every 30 minutes
- Does NOT access passwords, DMs, or private content

## Contact
- Website: https://suprfly.io

- Support: support@suprfly.io

## Company
- Founded: 2026
- Users: 10,000+
- Comments delivered: 5,000,000+
- Languages: 25+
- Account bans: 0
